sn47.28:1.0.1: The same setting. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Sāriputta said to the Venerable Anuruddha:
sn47.28:1.0.2: What four? Here, friend, I dwell contemplating the body in the body … feelings in feelings … mind in mind … phenomena in phenomena, ardent, clearly comprehending, mindful, having removed covetousness and displeasure in regard to the world. It is, friend, because I have developed and cultivated these four establishments of mindfulness that I directly know this thousandfold world."
